story.text: Action-space over-containment (T6) and representation-space over-containment (T7) are one shadow at two layers, and the shared counter-test is whether a stabilization is predictive or merely trivial.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'model-free-mode' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.model-free-mode-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
